Record Class BattleRoomView

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
fr.uge.view.BattleRoomView
public record BattleRoomView(ImageLoader loader) extends Record
Handles the graphical rendering of the Battle scene.

This view is responsible for drawing the hero, enemies, the backpack interface during combat, popups (curses, level up expansion), and the game over screen.

* @param loader The image loader used to retrieve assets for the battle.

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleRoomView

      public BattleRoomView(ImageLoader loader)
      Canonical constructor. * @param loader The image loader.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the loader is null.

  • Method Details

    • drawExpansionChoice

      public void drawExpansionChoice(com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext ctx, BackPack bp, List<Coordinate> targets, boolean isBoss)
      Draws the selection grid for the backpack expansion (Level Up event).

      This method renders a yellow highlight over valid coordinates where the player can choose to expand their inventory slot.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The application context.
      bp - The hero's backpack.
      targets - The list of valid coordinates where a slot can be added.
      isBoss - True if the current context is a boss fight (affects background rendering).

    • toBagCoordinate

      public Coordinate toBagCoordinate(float mouseX, float mouseY, int screenWidth, int screenHeight)
      Converts mouse screen coordinates into Backpack grid coordinates.

      This is used to determine which slot in the backpack is being clicked or hovered.

      Parameters:
      mouseX - The X position of the mouse.
      mouseY - The Y position of the mouse.
      screenWidth - The width of the window.
      screenHeight - The height of the window.
      Returns:
      The corresponding coordinate in the backpack grid.

    • drawCursePopup

      public void drawCursePopup(com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext c, int k)
      Renders a popup dialog offering a Cursed Item.

      Displays two buttons: "Prendre" (Take) and "Refuser" (Refuse). Refusing a cursed item results in damage.

      Parameters:
      c - The application context.
      k - Cost or identifier (unused in display currently).

    • clickAcceptCurse

      public boolean clickAcceptCurse(com.github.forax.zen.PointerEvent p, int screenWidth, int screenHeight)
      Checks if the mouse click was on the "Accept Curse" button.
      Parameters:
      p - The pointer event.
      screenWidth - The screen width.
      screenHeight - The screen height.
      Returns:
      true if the click is within the accept button's bounds.

    • clickRefuseCurse

      public boolean clickRefuseCurse(com.github.forax.zen.PointerEvent p, int screenWidth, int screenHeight)
      Checks if the mouse click was on the "Refuse Curse" button.
      Parameters:
      p - The pointer event.
      screenWidth - The screen width.
      screenHeight - The screen height.
      Returns:
      true if the click is within the refuse button's bounds.

    • draw

      public void draw(com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext ctx, Fight fight, List<Enemy> enemies, int activeIndex, BackPack bp, Item selectedItem)
      Main entry point to render the entire Battle scene.

      This handles the display of the hero, the enemies, the turn interface, the backpack, and item statistic panels. It also automatically detects if the current fight involves a Boss to adjust the background and UI.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The application context.
      fight - The current fight state.
      enemies - The list of enemies.
      activeIndex - The index of the currently active enemy (if any).
      bp - The hero's backpack.
      selectedItem - The item currently selected/hovered (for stats display).

    • drawGameOver

      public void drawGameOver(com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext ctx)
      Renders the Game Over screen.

      Displays a simple black screen with "GAME OVER" in red text.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The application context.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the loader record component.
